case_title: SOFIYA STARIKOVA VS. FARMER INSURANCE EXCHANGE
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION HEARING / UNDERINSURANCE MOTORIST CLAIM)

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 100057593) FILED BY PETITIONER STARIKOVA, SOFIYA
PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION HEARING / UNDERINSURANCE MOTORIST CLAIM FILED BY PETITIONER STARIKOVA, SOFIYA AS TO RESPONDENT FARMER INSURANCE EXCHANGE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SOFIYA STARIKOVA'S HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION HEARING OF UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. PETITIONER SOFIYA STARIKOVA'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION HEARING OF UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE DOES NOT DISPUTE THAT MS. STARIKOVA HAS AN UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM AND IS ENTITLED UNDER THE POLICY TO ARBITRATION. THE PARTIES SHALL RAISE ISSUES REGARDING THE SCHEDULING AND SCOPE OF THE ARBITRATION WITH THE SELECTED ARBITRATOR IN THE FIRST INSTANCE. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Hearing Of Underinsured Motorist Claim
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SOFIYA STARIKOVA's Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Hearing Of Underinsured Motorist Claim.

Petitioner Sofiya Starikova's petition to compel arbitration hearing of underinsured motorist claim is granted. Respondent Farmers Insurance Exchange does not dispute that Ms. Starikova has an underinsured motorist claim and is entitled under the policy to arbitration. The parties shall raise issues regarding the scheduling and scope of the arbitration with the selected arbitrator in the first instance.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com =(302/EPS)
